title: DeepHire AI
description: AI-powered recruitment platform with ATS, Resume Analysis and AI Interviewer.
technologies: Languages: Python, SQL, HTML5, CSS3
Frameworks: Streamlit
AI/ML: Machine Learning, Deep Learning, NLP, LLMs, Generative AI, Sentence Transformers, Semantic Similarity, TF-IDF, Cosine Similarity
Libraries: PyTorch, Scikit-learn, Pandas, NumPy, Plotly, PyMuPDF, PyPDF
Database: Supabase, PostgreSQL
Cloud & Deployment: Render, GitHub
Tools: Git, REST API, Python Dotenv
Domain: ATS, Resume Parsing, Skill Extraction, Candidate Ranking

title: Smart Shop Inventory
description: Inventory Management System using YOLO Detection and Automation.
technologies: Languages: Python, SQL
Frameworks: Streamlit
AI/ML: YOLOv8, Computer Vision, Object Detection, Automated Shelf Allocation
Libraries: Ultralytics YOLO, OpenCV, Pandas, NumPy, Plotly, Psycopg2, Python Dotenv
Database: Supabase, PostgreSQL
Cloud & Deployment: Render, GitHub
Tools: Git, REST API, VS Code
Visualization: Plotly, Interactive Charts, Warehouse Heatmap, Analytics Dashboard
Features: Live Inventory Management, Auto Shelf Allocation, Barcode Management, Stock Monitoring, Low Stock Alerts, Transaction Logging, Real-Time Inventory Updates

title: Smart Query Database

title: Smart Study Planner
description: AI assisted study planning and productivity system.
technologies: Languages: JavaScript (ES6+), Node.js, HTML5, CSS3
Frontend: React Native, Expo SDK, React Native Web
Backend: Node.js, Express.js
Database: MongoDB Atlas, Mongoose ODM
Authentication: JWT (JSON Web Tokens), Bcrypt.js, Guest Authentication, Google Sign-In (Planned)
Navigation: React Navigation (Stack Navigator, Bottom Tab Navigator)
State Management: React Context API, React Hooks
API Communication: REST APIs, Fetch API
Storage: AsyncStorage
UI/UX: React Native Components, Pressable, ActivityIndicator, KeyboardAvoidingView, Custom Theme System, Dark & Light Themes
Productivity Features: Pomodoro Timer, Study Planner, Session Logging, Activity Tracking, Statistics Dashboard
Security: Password Hashing, JWT Authentication, Protected Routes, Environment Variables (.env)
Deployment: Render (Backend Hosting), Netlify (Web Deployment), Expo Application Services (EAS Build)
Cross Platform: Android, React Native Web, Progressive Web Support
Version Control: Git, GitHub
Development Tools: VS Code, npm, Expo CLI, EAS CLI, Metro Bundler
Testing: Expo Go, Android Emulator, Physical Android Devices
Build Tools: Android APK, Android App Bundle (AAB), Bundletool
Architecture: Client-Server Architecture, RESTful API Architecture, Component-Based Design
status: In Progress and V1.0 is done.
